title: Telangana Assembly passes Advocates Protection Bill, 2026
description: The Telangana Legislative Assembly has passed the Telangana Advocates Protection Bill, 2026, ToI reported.The law aims to address increasing instances of violence against advocates by providing them with police protection, safeguards against false cases, and a dedicated grievance redressal mechanism.According to a post on X by State Minister for Information Technology, Electronics & Communication, Industry & Commerce, and Legislative Affairs Sridhar Babu Duddilla, the Bill was framed fol
